data.name: Light and Shadow - Doppelganger
data.detailed_description:
"Light and Shadow - Doppelganger" is an RPG game produced by Geocentrism Theory and published by Hanabi games.

Game Plot

In this cruel world, Nora's originally happy life is over in a flash. In order to repay the kindness of her adoptive parents, she resolutely embarks on the path of revenge.
Will she become a revered paladin or an assassin of darkness?

Game Content

This game is a role-playing type of game. Player controls the main character, Rora. Go through a series of thrilling adventures. Will she be able to break through the many obstacles to achieve her goal?

Characters






Game Features

  • Jrpg
  • Rich storyline
  • Voice acting

data.short_description: In this cruel world, Nora's originally happy life is over in a flash. In order to repay the kindness of her adoptive parents, she resolutely embarks on the path of revenge. Will she become a revered paladin or an assassin of darkness?
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

Minimum:

  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
